description: Anki .apkg 文件导入功能 - 支持直接导入 Anki 的 .apkg 文件，解析 ZIP 和 SQLite 数据库，保持模板样式和媒体文件

userStories.title: Add JSZip and sql.js dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to add JSZip and sql.js libraries to the web app for parsing .apkg files in the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Add jszip package to apps/web
Add sql.js package to apps/web
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create APKG parser service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create a parser service that can extract and parse .apkg files in the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apkg-parser.service.ts in apps/web/src/services/
Use JSZip to unzip .apkg file
Detect and extract collection.anki21 or collection.anki2 SQLite database
Use sql.js to open and query SQLite database
Parse media JSON mapping file
Support both anki21 and anki2 formats
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add import notes API endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to import Anki notes and cards into Echoe via API.
acceptanceCriteria: Create POST /api/v1/import/anki endpoint
Accept parsed Anki data (notes, cards, models, decks) in request body
Convert Anki notes to Echoe notes format
Parse Anki templates (qfmt, afmt) and store HTML content
Parse CSS from models and apply to notes
Create notes in database as new records
Create corresponding deck/folder structure from Anki decks
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add import review history API endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to import my Anki review history so I can continue learning with existing progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Add revlog parsing to import endpoint
Convert revlog entries to Echoe FSRS review records
Import review history with original timestamps
Preserve interval and ease factor data
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add media file import support
userStories.description: As a user, I want to import images and audio files from Anki cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract media files from unzipped apkg
Parse media JSON mapping (数字文件名 -> 原始文件名)
Upload media files to Echoe storage via existing API
Update note content to use new media URLs
Support common media types: images (jpg, png, gif, svg), audio (mp3, wav, ogg), video (mp4, webm)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Anki import UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a user interface to upload and import Anki .apkg files.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ImportPage in apps/web/src/pages/
Add file upload component with drag-and-drop support
Add .apkg file type validation
Show import progress (parsing, uploading, completed)
Display import statistics (notes count, cards count, media count)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add import error handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see clear error messages when import fails.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate .apkg file format before processing
Handle corrupted SQLite database gracefully
Handle missing media files gracefully
Show specific error messages with suggested fixes
Rollback partial imports on failure
Typecheck passes
